title: conditional-profile grid for dual-fuel swirl combustion
why_selected: Useful reference for a dense but still readable 3x2 conditional-profile grid that pairs mean curves with spread information across two cases and several quantities.
borrow: the repeated mean-plus-spread grammar across rows
the use of one normalized horizontal axis across the full grid
avoid_copying: the exact variable list if your problem has fewer meaningful rows
error-bar density that overwhelms the panel shapes
the full grid when a lighter starter like sample_0002 or sample_0003 is enough
